name: NCCL Diagnostics
summary: Collect NCCL communication evidence for multi-GPU and multi-node jobs.
description: This skill provides a conservative Slurm diagnostics wrapper for NCCL-related failures, including GPU topology, selected communication environment variables, NCCL debug settings, and an optional small nccl-tests run.

tools.name: all_reduce_perf
tools.notes: Provided by NVIDIA nccl-tests when available.

inputs.name: gpu_partition
inputs.description: Slurm partition or queue that provides NVIDIA GPU nodes.

inputs.name: nodes
inputs.description: Number of nodes used for diagnostics.

inputs.name: gpus_per_node
inputs.description: Number of GPUs requested per node.

inputs.name: run_nccl_tests
inputs.description: Opt-in flag that runs a small all_reduce_perf test when nccl-tests is installed.

outputs.name: nccl_diagnostics_log
outputs.description: Captured Slurm, CUDA, NCCL, GPU topology, and optional all_reduce_perf output.

outputs.name: environment_report
outputs.description: Filtered communication-related environment variables for support review.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Submit to a short GPU partition and review the diagnostic log; set RUN_NCCL_TESTS=1 only when nccl-tests is available and the allocation is appropriate.
